message:
feat(tui): add startup changelog notices, shift+tab thinking level cycling, and streamline test suite

Startup changelog ("What's New"):
- New StartupChangelog enum (Condensed/Full) with collect_startup_changelog_sections()
  that parses CHANGELOG.md and shows new sections since lastChangelogVersion
- persist_last_changelog_version_with_roots() stores the seen version in settings
- changelog_heading_matches_version() for heading-to-semver matching
- render_startup_placeholder() renders the banner with markdown formatting
- Respects quiet_startup and collapse_changelog config flags
- PiApp::new() gains persist_startup_settings parameter to control disk writes

Thinking level cycling:
- New cycle_thinking_level() method cycles through Off -> Minimal -> Low ->
  Medium -> High -> XHigh based on model capabilities
- ModelEntry::available_thinking_levels() returns valid levels per model
  (non-reasoning: Off only; reasoning: Off through High; xhigh-capable: add XHigh)
- AppAction::CycleThinkingLevel mapped to shift+tab (replaces ctrl+t toggle)
- Updates session header, triggers save, updates agent stream options

Test suite refactor:
- Remove ~2000 lines of tests from interactive/tests.rs replaced by focused
  coverage for new features (changelog persistence, file-reference whitespace,
  thinking binding hint)
- New build_test_app(cwd) helper using hermetic_interactive_config()
- File-reference whitespace handling: is_linebreak, is_horizontal_whitespace,
  trim_trailing_horizontal_whitespace, trailing_line_is_blank helpers
- All test files updated to pass persist_startup_settings: false and use
  hermetic_interactive_config() for isolation
- Minor cleanup: remove unnecessary borrow in terminal_images.rs,
  trailing whitespace fix in text_utils.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
